mnemonics.title: XP Values - CSFCR
mnemonics.content:
C - Communication
S - Simplicity
F - Feedback
C - Courage
R - Respect

Remember: 'Can Simple Fixes Create Results'

mnemonics.title: TDD Cycle - RGB
mnemonics.content:
R - Red (failing test)
G - Green (passing test)
B - Blue/Refactor (improve code)

Like traffic lights in reverse!
